description: Italian-American Mafia crime family based in Pueblo and Denver, Colorado. Originated as a bootlegging organization under the Carlino brothers in the 1920s, later taken over by Giuseppe Roma and evolved into the Denver branch of La Cosa Nostra. Engaged in extortion, loan sharking, drug trafficking, and other rackets. Believed defunct by the 2000s after the death of Clarence Smaldone.

country_links.evidence_quote: Founding location: Denver and Pueblo , Colorado, United States
country_links.context: The Colorado crime family is based in Denver and Pueblo, Colorado, and has territory in Las Vegas, all within the United States.
